item.title: Version 1.3.8
item.description: Fix Safari extension notification spam, fix Sparkle autoupdate (legacy redirect was silently freezing users on old binaries), fix onboarding restarting after updates, remove About page

item.title: Version 1.3.7
item.description: Intro splash plays every launch

item.title: Version 1.3.6
item.description: Cinematic intro before onboarding, Stop-all-blocks button, fix block editor losing websites when switching to Device Block

item.title: Version 1.3.5
item.description: Onboarding: real hatching video, focusdragon hero image, merged catch flow, polished Wings page

item.title: Version 1.3.4
item.description: Onboarding polish + fix for the false 'permission missing' page Chrome kept opening at block-start. Egg now renders as a real shell instead of a wireframe; Voice scale (notifications) now bounces you to System Settings when notifications were previously denied; Beat 3's preset block ships enabled so the Beat 7 test actually blocks. App-side bugfix: stopped misreading our own protective grace-timer touch as a daemon kill, which was firing the Chrome fix-no-block page on every block-start even when the extension was fully configured.

item.title: Version 1.3.3
item.description: Hotfix: 1.3.2 crashed on launch for any user who hadn't completed onboarding (new installs and anyone who reset onboarding state). The egg view's crack-rendering loop trapped on Range 1...0 when crackCount was 0. Fixed.

item.title: Version 1.3.2
item.description: Dragon onboarding (named dragon, hatching arc, scales for permissions, hoard for caught distractions); custom block icons; auto-relocate to /Applications on first launch so the background service always registers; clearer error when the daemon can't register; dead-link cleanup in extension help and migrated to focusdragon.app.

item.title: Version 1.3.1
item.description: AI Powered block mode (beta) with single-pane editor and per-block task description; major hang fixes for state writes, dscl, AppleScript, and System Settings polling.

item.title: Version 1.3.0
item.description: Intent-aware blocking: set a task, FocusDragon watches what you're doing every 30s and force-quits drift. Three per-block enforcement levels (Suggest, Nudge, Hard). Plus weekly Sunday focus summaries, Distraction Suggester, and 30-min auto-update checks.

item.title: Version 1.2.4
item.description: AI block builder (preview): describe a block in one sentence and Claude fills in the fields. Bring your own Anthropic key in Settings → AI. Plus: Chrome wake-grace extended to 60s with a proper wake observer, frozen blocks auto-enable Locked Block, Frozen option restored to the manual lock picker, Dashboard focusing-badge color fix.

item.title: Version 1.2.3
item.description: Fixes Chrome force-quit on laptop wake and the spurious chrome://extensions + fix-no-block pages opening at block-start. Both were caused by the daemon misreading the heartbeat as stale immediately after sleep — the file mtime is from before sleep, so it looked ancient against wall-clock. The enforcer now detects sleep gaps and applies a 30-second wake-grace window before resuming heartbeat enforcement.

item.title: Version 1.2.2
item.description: UI polish across Extension Status, Pomodoro, Dashboard, and Statistics pages. Refinements to random-text breaks, Safari restart flow, and blocked-page styling.

item.title: Version 1.2.1
item.description: Fixes Chrome extension status mismatch (green now truly means green — host permissions, incognito, and heartbeat all checked together), wires up Launch-at-login via SMAppService so the toggle actually does something, aligns the statistics bar charts by pinning the y-axis label column width, switches the dashboard to long-form durations ("9 minutes" not "9m", with singular/plural and scaling into days / months / years / decades), and locks the menu-bar app name to "FocusDragon".

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description: UI polish pass: FDA onboarding gate (Refresh Status + Skip-for-now), block-row redesign with color accent bars, typography scale tokens, directional page transitions, InfoTip popovers on strictness toggles, breaks-chip wrapping fix, rubber-band bounce disabled on short pages, Settings Check-for-Updates button, menu bar name shows FocusDragon, favicon white-ring fix on focusdragon.app, chrome-extension self-URL exemption, email capture on download.

item.title: Version 1.1.9
item.description: CRITICAL: Fixes auto-updates. The Sparkle appcast URL key was silently missing from every shipped Info.plist, which is why Check for Updates returned 'You must specify the URL of the appcast as the SUFeedURL key'. Going forward, auto-updates work. Existing users on 1.0.0–1.1.8 need to download this one manually from focusdragon.app — after that, 1.2.0 and beyond will auto-update. Also: the About section now shows the real bundle version instead of a hardcoded 1.0.0.

item.title: Version 1.1.8
item.description: Bulletproof block-editor save: typed name and website fields now commit synchronously before Create Block / Add fires, so edits aren't silently dropped. Added a post-save verification that shows a visible error instead of failing silently if a block doesn't land in the list.

item.title: Version 1.1.7
item.description: New Advanced Mode toggle: "Block chrome://extensions during blocks" (default OFF). When on, a configurable grace period (default 60s) keeps chrome://extensions reachable for extension fixes. Fixes stale-state detection so chrome://extensions can't stay trapped on the block page after a block ends.

item.title: Version 1.1.6
item.description: Critical fix: System Settings no longer force-quits outside of active locks (unblocks granting Full Disk Access). Safari "extension tampered" alert now debounces instead of spamming, and missing Full Disk Access is detected distinctly from a disabled extension.

item.title: Version 1.1.5
item.description: Cold Turkey parity (advanced URL matching, pre-made lists, all six break types, dashboard, statistics, device blocks, multi-user targeting), Chrome extension + Extensions sidebar, Date Lock, Locked Block mode, redesigned Block Editor with tabbed layout, launch-hang fix, Sentry + PostHog telemetry, signed native messaging host

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description: New onboarding tutorials with permission status feedback; Safari extension enforcement now reads state from disk instead of AppleScript.

item.title: Version 1.0
item.description: Initial release of FocusDragon — a free, open distraction blocker for macOS.
